name: Run PowerShell Script from ADS Detected
description: PowerShell script execution from Alternate Data Stream (ADS) is detected. Attackers often hide malicious scripts in Alternate Data Streams (ADS) to evade detection and maintain persistence.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the execution of a PowerShell script from an Alternate Data Stream (ADS) at `{timestamp}` on host `{hostname}`. The command line used was `{command_line}`. Identify the user (`{user_name}`) who initiated this activity and the specific file and stream from which the script was executed. Analyze the contents of the script if possible. Provide a summary of the findings and recommend steps to remove the malicious ADS and contain the threat.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the activity was detected.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the PowerShell process.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
